items.name: Green Dragon
items.description: Green Dragon visit us for more cool stuf! https://www.roblox.com/groups/34376130/Metaskins-Creations-UGC#!/store Roar into Adventure with the Dino Rider Costume! Unleash your inner dino-rider with this epic dinosaur costume! Perfect for those who love dinosaurs and riding adventures, this costume lets you become a brave explorer on the back of a mighty dino! Realistic Design: Looks like you’re riding a huge dino with your chest and head visible! Fun and Playful: Ideal for Roblox adventures, role-playing, and making friends laugh! Comfortable Fit: Designed to keep you comfy while you embark on your dino quests. Get ready to roar, explore, and make unforgettable memories with your new dino buddy! Perfect for any dino-loving Robloxian!
